Name: Elite Dangerous Mining Mapper
Author: CMDR Kailoren
Description: Screenshot the good rocks while mining in Elite Dangerous, auto-organized by system/body/ring, so you can find them again next time.

Actions.Name: Start/Stop Session
Actions.Tooltip: Press to lock onto the current System/Body/Ring and start recording (arms Save Snapshot / Undo). Press again to end the session.

Actions.Name: Select Mineral
Actions.Tooltip: Opens a picker to tag the current session with a hotspot mineral (Laser or Core mining), used to create a per-mineral subfolder within the ring.

Actions.Name: Save Snapshot
Actions.Tooltip: Screenshots the Elite Dangerous window and adds it to the current ring's book.

Actions.Name: Undo
Actions.Tooltip: Deletes the most recently captured screenshot in the current ring's book.

Actions.Name: Open Library
Actions.Tooltip: Opens the local web viewer to page through recorded hotspot screenshots.

Actions.Name: Open Screenshots Folder
Actions.Tooltip: Opens the base screenshots folder (set in Start Session) in File Explorer, so you can manually manage files before uploading.
